_comment: Assume-only inline policy for the per-machine bootstrap user trains-bootstrap-<machine>. Its SOLE power is sts:AssumeRole on the two TRAINS bench roles — clean blast-radius separation from the ao-bootstrap-<machine> users (which may assume ONLY BedrockInvokeRole; do not widen them). The deploy role is listed for the interim laptop path; once Phase 2 moves deploy to GitHub-OIDC/CodeBuild, drop TrainsBenchDeployRole from here so the laptop can only assume the small run role. Replace <BENCH_ACCOUNT_ID>.
